title: Google Calendar Integration Problems
excerpt: When I am trying to integrate my google calendar with monday.com a technical issue error is popping up. Did anyone experience this before? I want to integrate my date columns so they will appear in my calendar.

posts.author: Menia (Gabriel Darmenia)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I am trying to integrate my google calendar with monday.com a technical issue error is popping up. Did anyone experience this before? I want to integrate my date columns so they will appear in my calendar.

image1819×863 18.9 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Menia!

I am afraid I cannot replicate this behaviour, so this seems a little buggy to me. I’d recommend reaching out to our support team via support@monday.com incase our technical experts need to investigate Apologies for the double work!
